name: Lands
description: Claim land, team up with neighbors, form nations. Wars are opt-in, both sides have to accept.

name: CoreProtect
description: Block logging and rollback. Grief protection and investigation tool.

name: Dynmap/BlueMap
description: Live web-based world map with real-time player positions.

name: DiscordSRV
description: Two-way chat bridge between Discord and the Minecraft server.

name: Playtime Tracker
description: Tracks player playtime and powers the world border expansion system.
